{{Item
| name = 
| image = Master treat.png
| id = master_treat
| type = Treats
| stackable = 64
}}<blockquote>This is the final treat as far as [[Leveling Systems|basic leveling]] goes. It will raise your dog's level by 1 (and 1 spendable point) until level 60.
</blockquote>

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| [[Super Treat]] <br>+ Diamond
|[[File:Master treat crafting.png]]
|}

== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' on your dog to use the item.

== Used In ==
* [[Kami Treat]]
* [[Breeding Bone]]

== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
* In the future, there might be a massive overhaul of the treat mechanism.
